description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push to all branches except staging.tmp, trying.tmp, and staging-squash-merge.tmp, and on pull requests. Use a matrix job that builds and tests on multiple OS environments (ubuntu-latest, macOS-latest, windows-latest, ubuntu-16.04) with different configurations, including fancy build options. For each OS, check out the repository, prepare the environment, build in debug and release modes, test, and package the build artifacts.
